name: Possible DC Shadow Attack
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ilyas Ochkov, oscd.community, Chakib Gzenayi (@Chak092), Hosni Mribah
SIGMA Title: Possible DC Shadow Attack
SIGMA Description: Detects DCShadow via create new SPN

False positives:
- Valid on domain controllers; exclude known DCs

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4742 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%gc/%') OR ("Event ID"=5136 AND (Username='servicePrincipalName' OR "Account Name"='servicePrincipalName' OR "Distinguished Name"='servicePrincipalName') AND (LOWER("Attribute Old Value") LIKE 'gc/%' OR LOWER("Attribute New Value") LIKE 'gc/%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Possible DC Shadow Attack on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=4742 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%gc/%') OR ("Event ID"=5136 AND (Username='servicePrincipalName' OR "Account Name"='servicePrincipalName' OR "Distinguished Name"='servicePrincipalName') AND (LOWER("Attribute Old Value") LIKE 'gc/%' OR LOWER("Attribute New Value") LIKE 'gc/%'))) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Possible DC Shadow Attack

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Ilyas Ochkov, oscd.community, Chakib Gzenayi (@Chak092), Hosni Mribah SIGMA Title: Possible DC Shadow Attack SIGMA Description: Detects DCShadow via create new SPN  False positives: - Valid on domain controllers; exclude known DCs  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
